calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jun-01-2021 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar May-04-2021 Continued To Jun-01-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Jason Yang, via ZOOM, counsel for Trudy Chui-Kuen Yan, Administrator.

At the outset, counsel is advised that the disclaimer is untimely and is stricken in open court. The court queries counsel regarding how he'd like to proceed. Counsel advises he would like to file an assignment instead which the court prefers, to avoid any disputes in the future.

After additional discussion, the Accounting Petition is continued to June 01, 2021 at 9:00 am in Department 204. Counsel is ordered to file the new assignment by May 24, 2021. Additionally, counsel is advised to follow-up with the Examiner assigned to this matter to discuss the submission of a new [proposed] order.

Judge: Hon. Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.
